author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs: upgrade and simplify tools (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#937)
body:
* wip: improve doc site

* chore(doc): remove dead code

* remove dead code

* unvendor community header

* strip doc build from all its fanciness that prevent it from running in modern node

* remove unused watch modes

* codesandbox is old

* poor man's PR deploy of docs

* rel

* update jsdoc-parse to jsdoc-to-markdown

* update markdown

- no spaces in image names
- no newlines inside a html escape hbs
- marked 0.7.0 (newer, but not newest)
